description: Conservative preservation/review pack for Clever Internet Suite and related CleverComponents libraries. Most internet components are nonvisual and may be preserved when compatible packages are available; visual samples, dialogs, and database-structure tools require review.

rules.notes: HTTP component is nonvisual and may be preserved with compatible Clever Internet Suite packages.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review TLS, proxy, authentication, async callbacks, and platform networking behavior.

rules.notes: FTP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review passive/active mode, TLS, filesystem paths, and deployment behavior.

rules.notes: SFTP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review key files, host-key validation, local paths, and platform support.

rules.notes: SMTP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review OAuth/TLS configuration, attachments, and async event handling.

rules.notes: POP3 component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review OAuth/TLS configuration, message storage paths, and threading.

rules.notes: IMAP component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review folder synchronization, OAuth/TLS configuration, and background operations.
OAuth callback browser/redirect behavior may need platform-specific FMX UI and deployment review.

rules.notes: JSON parser is nonvisual and may be preserved.
SOAP message component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review generated service code, TLS, and XML namespace behavior.

rules.notes: Mail message component is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review attachments, encodings, inline images, and filesystem paths.
Certificate stores can be OS-specific and require target-platform review.

rules.notes: Thread pool is nonvisual and may be preserved.
rules.manual_review_reason: Review synchronization with FMX UI thread.
Database comparer/migration components require database and UI workflow review.
Task execution may depend on Windows shell paths, scripts, and process behavior.
